name: Line Chart
bestFor: Trends over time, continuous data, time series
keywords: trend time series line continuous data
accessibility: Provide data table below, describe trend direction

name: Bar Chart (Vertical)
bestFor: Comparing values across categories, ranking, discrete data
keywords: comparison bar vertical category ranking discrete
accessibility: Sortable data table, high contrast bar colors

name: Bar Chart (Horizontal)
bestFor: Many categories, long category labels, ranking
keywords: comparison bar horizontal ranking labels categories
accessibility: Labels readable, color + pattern fill

name: Pie / Donut Chart
bestFor: Proportions, percentages, composition (max 5 categories)
keywords: proportion pie donut percentage composition parts
accessibility: Provide data table, labels on segments, avoid 3D

name: Area Chart
bestFor: Volume over time, cumulative data, magnitude + trend
keywords: area volume cumulative magnitude trend stacked
accessibility: Transparent fill for stacking, data table below

name: Scatter Plot
bestFor: Correlation, distribution, relationship between variables
keywords: scatter correlation distribution relationship variable xy
accessibility: Provide regression line description, data table

name: Histogram
bestFor: Distribution of data, frequency of values, statistical analysis
keywords: histogram distribution frequency statistical bins
accessibility: Describe distribution shape, bin count

name: Heatmap
bestFor: Geographic data, intensity mapping, correlation matrix
keywords: heatmap geographic intensity correlation matrix density
accessibility: Color + value labels, not color-only

name: Radar / Spider Chart
bestFor: Multivariate comparison, performance profiles, skill assessments
keywords: radar spider multivariate comparison profile performance
accessibility: Use max 6 axes, data table, high contrast

name: Treemap
bestFor: Hierarchical data, part-to-whole relationships, space-filling
keywords: treemap hierarchical part-whole nested rectangle
accessibility: Provide navigation to drill down, labels

name: Bubble Chart
bestFor: Three dimensions (x, y, size), relationship + magnitude
keywords: bubble three-dimensions x-y size magnitude relationship
accessibility: Data table with all dimensions

name: Gauge / Speedometer
bestFor: Single metric against target, dashboards, KPI monitoring
keywords: gauge speedometer single-metric target dashboard KPI
accessibility: Show exact value, not just visual position

name: Funnel Chart
bestFor: Conversion tracking, pipeline analysis, sales stages
keywords: funnel conversion pipeline sales drop-off stage
accessibility: Show absolute + relative values per stage

name: Waterfall Chart
bestFor: Bridge analysis, financial breakdown, incremental changes
keywords: waterfall bridge financial incremental breakdown cumulative
accessibility: Describe each step change with text

name: Sankey Diagram
bestFor: Flow between stages, energy/material movement, user journeys
keywords: sankey flow journey movement path stage connection
accessibility: Describe major flows as text summary

name: Candlestick Chart
bestFor: Financial data, stock prices, OHLC data
keywords: candlestick financial stock ohlc open high low close
accessibility: Provide data table with OHLC values

name: Timeline Chart
bestFor: Event sequences, project milestones, Gantt view
keywords: timeline event sequence gantt milestone project schedule
accessibility: Describe event sequence as list

name: Network Graph
bestFor: Relationships between entities, social networks, node-link diagrams
keywords: network graph relationship entity node-link social
accessibility: Describe key connections as text

name: Box Plot
bestFor: Statistical distribution, outliers, data spread across groups
keywords: box-plot statistical distribution outlier spread quartile
accessibility: Explain quartiles and outliers in text

name: Geographic Map
bestFor: Location-based data, regional comparisons, spatial analysis
keywords: geographic map location regional choropleth spatial analysis
accessibility: Pin labels, describe regional data in text
